name: Toutiao News Inspired
description: A Toutiao-inspired GEOFlow frontend theme with a channel rail, news feed, compact cards, and right-side hot list.
notes: Inspired by modern news portal layout patterns. Does not copy Toutiao assets, content, or proprietary code.
Keeps GEOFlow Blade variables, SEO meta fields, markdown HTML rendering, category navigation, footer, and article routes intact.
